description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, aerodynamic design with a predominantly black body accented by bold red and gold graphics. The hull is streamlined with twin pointed bows and a low, wide stance, suggesting high performance and stability on water. The cockpit area is centrally located, with a rounded, slightly raised seat and a compact handlebar assembly. Large exhaust ports are visible at the rear, flanking a central propulsion system, while the sides display branding and decorative elements. The surface finish is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the smooth, hard exterior. The overall build appears robust, with materials likely including reinforced plastic or fiberglass and metal components for structural integrity.
description: A sleek black and red jet ski with gold accents, streamlined twin bows, and a glossy, aerodynamic body. Features a central cockpit, bold branding, and prominent rear exhausts.
description_view_0: Rear view showing dual exhaust ports, central propulsion, and the rounded seat with visible branding.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the elongated hull, cockpit placement, and 'SELECT' branding along the side.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the twin pointed bows, central cockpit, and the smooth, contoured nose.
description_view_3: Right side profile similar to the left, with visible branding and the aerodynamic shape of the hull.
attribute_brand_logo: A circular red and gold emblem with a crown motif is visible on the sides and rear of the jet ski.
attribute_handlebar_design: Compact, black handlebar with slight upward curves and integrated controls, positioned above the cockpit.
attribute_seat_configuration: Single, rounded seat with a raised backrest, black with red accents, designed for one rider.
